Blossom / Blossom / Blossom

Blossom
Blossom
Catalog Number SSC-0013
Release Date May 27, 2012 Reitaisai 9
Publish Format Doujin/Indie
Release Price 1000 JPY
Media Format CD
Classification Arrangement, Vocal, Remix
PublisherStudio "Syrup Comfiture" / Studio "Syrup Comfiture" / Studio "Syrup Comfiture"

Credits

Composer / ComposerZUN, Syrufit (hiro.na)
Arranger / ArrangerShibayan, Syrufit (hiro.na), Linjin / 隣人, Nhato, Taishi, Tomoyuki Sakakida
Performer / PerformerMei Ayakura / 綾倉盟
Lyricist / LyricistMei Ayakura / 綾倉盟, Linjin / 隣人

  • English
Disc 1

Disc length 57:58

 

Notes

Reitaisai 9 release.
